creator: jims@bluenotch.com
text:
I approve, I just forwarded it from a different account because my
original submission bounced in email.

Regards,

Jim Shewmaker 

> -----Original Message-----
> From: Edwin Groothuis [mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.ORG] 
> Sent: Friday, September 22, 2006 12:31 PM
> To: jims@bluenotch.com
> Subject: Re: ports/103497: [maintainer-update] sysutils/nagios-statd
> 
> 
> Maintainer of sysutils/nagios-statd,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/103497 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a 
> bug fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you 
> approve the patch and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103497
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
